arts.ttl: Juventus Set Sights on Out-of-Favor Chelsea Midfielder
arts.sum: Serie A giants Juventus have reportedly added Chelsea outcast Cesare Casadei to their list of targets ahead of the winter transfer window. According to Calciomercato, the record-time Italian champions see the 21-year-old as a favorable market opportunity after he tumbled down the pecking order at Stamford Bridge. arts.ttl: Juventus Eye Zirkzee as Napoli and Atalanta Compete for Raspadori
AC Milan’s Critical Clash Against Juventus: Fonseca’s Last-Minute Lineup Shuffle
Douglas Luiz to Man Utd? Juventus consider SHOCK swap
arts.sum: According to Italian media, Juventus could try to engineer a shock swap with Manchester United that would see Douglas Luiz return to the Premier League while Joshua Zirkzee would head back to Serie A. The Old Lady are interested in Man Utd forward Joshua Zirkzee but know that a January move could prove difficult, so the outlet suggests that they could seek a swap deal with Luiz.

arts.ttl: Juventus eyeing Cesare Casadei as Chelsea midfielder’s future uncertain
arts.sum: Juventus has reignited its interest in Cesare Casadei, the talented 2003-born midfielder currently with Chelsea, after a pause in discussions over recent months. Casadei, who has struggled to secure a place in Enzo Maresca’s plans at Chelsea, could represent a valuable opportunity for the Bianconeri as his playing time diminishes. Calciomercato report how over the past two years, Casadei has been on loan at Reading and Leicester City to gain experience and develop his skills. This summer, he opted to stay at Chelsea, reuniting with his former coach Maresca. arts.ttl: Pulisic doubtful for Milan’s clash against Juventus
arts.sum: As AC Milan prepares for a crucial match against Juventus, concerns are rising over the fitness of Christian Pulisic. The American forward is reportedly not at his best and may miss the game scheduled for tomorrow at 18:00. Pulisic recently returned to Italy after representing the United States in international fixtures, where he played a significant role, including an assist in a victory over Jamaica and scoring a goal in another match. Despite his recent performances, Pulisic’s condition has raised alarms at Milanello. arts.ttl: Gazzetta: Douglas Luiz on the market after a troubling start at Juventus
arts.sum: Douglas Luiz, the Brazilian midfielder who joined Juventus in a high-profile transfer from Aston Villa, is reportedly already on the market as the January transfer window approaches. Since his arrival, Luiz has struggled to make an impact, leading to speculation about his future with the club. La Gazzetta dello Sport report how the 26-year-old has been sidelined since October 22 due to injury and has failed to impress under the management of Thiago Motta. The anticipated chemistry between player and coach has not materialized, and Luiz’s performances have raised doubts about his suitability for Motta’s tactical approach.
